name: Rescript
long_description: Rescript helps compliance and advocacy teams effortlessly research and monitor changing laws and public policy. F100 enterprises, AmLaw100 firms, and BGov Top-10 lobbying firms use Rescript to summarize the legal landscape for their issues, and then track how it changes over time. We're backed by seed funding from YC, General Catalyst, and Floodgate.
one_liner: AI for Legal & Public Policy Teams
